Jobs by Site.sql: SELECT site, COUNT(*) as count FROM jobs GROUP BY site ORDER BY count DESC
Jobs by Site.description: Distribution of jobs across different platforms

Top Skills.sql:
SELECT skill, COUNT(*) as jobs
FROM (
    SELECT json_each.value as skill
    FROM jobs, json_each(jobs.extracted_skills)
    WHERE jobs.extracted_skills IS NOT NULL 
    AND jobs.extracted_skills != ''
    AND jobs.extracted_skills != '[]'
)
GROUP BY skill 
ORDER BY jobs DESC 
LIMIT 15
Top Skills.description: Most frequently extracted skills from job descriptions

My Matched Skills.sql:
SELECT skill, COUNT(*) as jobs
FROM (
    SELECT json_each.value as skill
    FROM jobs, json_each(jobs.matched_skills)
    WHERE jobs.matched_skills IS NOT NULL 
    AND jobs.matched_skills != ''
    AND jobs.matched_skills != '[]'
)
GROUP BY skill 
ORDER BY jobs DESC 
LIMIT 15
My Matched Skills.description: Skills from your resume that match job requirements

Score Distribution.sql: SELECT llm_score as score, COUNT(*) as count FROM jobs WHERE llm_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY llm_score ORDER BY llm_score

Jobs Timeline.sql: SELECT DATE(date_scraped) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM jobs WHERE date_scraped IS NOT NULL GROUP BY date ORDER BY date

Top Companies.sql: SELECT company, COUNT(*) as jobs FROM jobs WHERE company IS NOT NULL GROUP BY company ORDER BY jobs DESC LIMIT 10

Key Metrics.sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jobs) as total_jobs,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM applications) as applications,
    (SELECT ROUND(AVG(llm_score), 1) FROM jobs WHERE llm_score IS NOT NULL) as avg_score,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jobs WHERE llm_score >= 8) as high_matches

Remote vs On-site.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE WHEN is_remote = 1 THEN 'Remote' ELSE 'On-site' END as type,
    COUNT(*) as count
FROM jobs
GROUP BY is_remote
